title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Police officer Happu Singh lives a fun filled life with his large family that includes his mother, his wife and nine children. But he often finds himself in comical troubles of his own making.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Frustrated by the blackouts, everyone urges Pandit Ji to restore the power. Later, Manmohan instructs Saxena to sneak out at night and sever Vibhuti's power line.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: An angry Vibhuti begins tearing all the pillows in his room; Vibhuti gets ready to meet Angoori but tells his wife that he is going to a friend's birthday party.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Despite Manmohan only pretending to be romantically interested in Tillu, Vibhuti remains kind to him. In the end, Manmohan goes to the holy man for an antidote.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti compliments Angoori on her cooking prowess; a dog comes close to Vibhuti to urinate, which makes Manmohan laugh, and it ends up biting both of them.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti and Manmohan visit a client together when Manmohan gets bitten by a dog. Later, Dr Gupta arrives and mistakenly injects the antidote into Vibhuti.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan drags Deepu home and orders him to clean the kitchen. Meanwhile, Anita asks Vibhuti about his day and he tells her that his body hurts from doing all the work.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan uses Angoori's injury as an excuse to ask Anita for help, specifically requesting that her servant, Deepu Mastana, handle his housework.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan, unaware that Deepu is Vibhuti in disguise, asks him to help Angoori with her chores; Manmohan tells Anita that he plans on appointing Deepu as their full-time servant.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori discovers that their new servant is Manmohan in disguise as Deepu ran away. Later, Anita is upset about a patch ruining her favourite saree and Manmohan promises to clean it up.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan runs a business and is married to a simple girl, while Narayan is unemployed but has an ultra-modern wife. Both attempt to impress each other's spouse.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori informs her mother-in-law of Manmohan's accident and memory loss. Later, Manmohan's staff member comes back with Anita's saree.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti grows suspicious after discovering a strand of hair on Manmohan's shirt and vows to find its owner. Meanwhile, Manmohan tries to protect Anita from a perceived threat.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: When Saxena returns from the hospital, Manmohan tries to keep him away from Vibhuti. Eventually, Vibuthi attempts to tell Angoori something important about Manmohan.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti asks Angoori to accompany him so he can prove to her that Manmohan is having an affair. Later, Vibhuti conducts a DNA test on the hair strand, only to find that it belongs to Angoori.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti ignores Angoori to make feel restless and come to him. Instead, Angoori stops talking to him in an effort to get him to approach her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: In an attempt to socialise more, Anita invites Angoori and Manmohan over for dinner. Meanwhile, Vibhuti makes arrangements to cook in an effort to impress Angoori.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Jeetu Pandey finds himself caught living a life of duality. He juggles his time with two mothers, two contrasting belief systems, and two spouses while hiding one from another.
